name: ai-expert-plugin
description: AI Expert Plugin — specialist in AI plugins, skills, commands, agents, and context windows. Covers plugin architecture and creation, skill design and MECE decomposition, command layered framework design, agent building, and context window 6-layer architecture (L0-L5).
